arts.ttl: I thought Newcastle United transfer was a wind up
arts.sum: Franz Carr reflects on his time at Newcastle United with a mix of fondness and regret, recalling how the £250,000 move from Nottingham Forest in 1991 was one that Brian Clough later lamented. United, under then manager Ossie Ardiles, had paid £250,000 to land Carr from Nottingham Forest in 1991 - although he revealed he thought news of the bid was a hoax!

arts.ttl: Team News: Newcastle United vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: The Newcastle United teams that topped the Premier League on Christmas Day
arts.sum: That would eventually prove to be a key result for the Red Devils but incredibly Keegan's side led the table from the first weekend of the season all the way to the end of March when a 2-0 defeat against Arsenal saw them slip to second. Despite staying in second and in touch with Manchester United, Newcastle's fight for the title ended on the last game of the season after they were held by Tottenham Hotspur and Middlesbrough folded against the Red Devils at the Riverside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United ‘not open’ to letting player leave – Club officials looking for ‘credible alternatives’ for January
arts.sum: There has been no shortage of speculation about Newcastle United’s Sandro Tonali in the past few days. The talk of an exit was played down by his agent Giuseppe Riso but this was followed by talk that Juventus see the Italian as a potential target. arts.sum: Liverpool’s Luis Díaz has heaped praise on Aston Villa’s Jhon Durán during an interview with ESPN’s Sportscenter. The Liverpool star and the Aston Villa striker have played together for Colombia and the 27-year-old knows Durán well from their time with the national team. arts.sum: Since Samuel Iling-Junior joined Aston Villa in the summer, times haven’t been great for the Englishman. The winger joined Bologna on loan and scored against Como early in the stint. It was thought that Iling-Junior would take his development forward from there but the opposite has happened. arts.sum: Liverpool, Arsenal, Bournemouth, Aston Villa and Newcastle are the Premier League representatives in the European Team of the Week. Stars from Mainz, Girona, Bayer Leverkusen and Roma also make the cu...

arts.ttl: I'm the son of a Liverpool legend but brutal Ruud Gullit showdown ended my Newcastle United career
arts.sum: Paul Dalglish has revealed the intense confrontation with Ruud Gullit that signalled the end of his time at Newcastle United . The son of football legend Kenny Dalglish, Paul emerged as a promising talent for the Magpies in 1998, netting two goals under Gullit's management before a dispute regarding his father's interactions with club staff post-departure led to his exclusion from the team.

arts.ttl: Player’s agent reveals Newcastle will open exit door on one condition – Confirms ‘a lot of interest’
arts.sum: Newcastle United’s Miguel Almirón has seen his game time restricted this season, getting 300 minutes from 10 games in all competitions. This includes 164 minutes from three games in the EFL Cup and 47 minutes of action for the Magpies since the start of November. Almirón’s situation at Newcastle has encouraged interest from multiple clubs.
